output_units.vehicles: Average Daily Segment Traffic (StL Volume) — from network performance

_metadata.structural_note: Vehicle volumes are segment-based (network performance); ped/bike volumes are zone-based (zone activity). Both use StL Volume. Segment and zone boundaries roughly correspond but are not identical — do not treat as precisely equivalent geographic units.
_metadata.comparability_note: All modes use StL Volume. Cross-mode comparison is valid in unit terms. However, vehicle data uses segment metrics and ped/bike use zone activity — this structural difference must be disclosed in any UI showing modes together.
_metadata.notes: Verified against raw Streetlight CSV exports.
